name: Creamed Turkey
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mushrooms (drained from a 4 oz. can)
1 cup Chicken or Turkey Broth (or 1 can Cream of Chicken Soup, undiluted)
Optional: dash White Wine or Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the mushrooms, onion, and green pepper in butter until tender.
2. Blend in flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Remove from heat and slowly stir in broth and cream mixture.
4. Bring to a boil over low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Boil for 1 minute.
6. Add turkey and pimento.
7. Continue cooking until meat is heated through.
8. Serve hot with rice or in patty shells.
Serves 4
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV, ed. 1974
